```{r, function-tune_ci_forest}
    best_control <- .ci_control_from_grid_row(refit_params)
    best_type <- as.character(refit_params$type[1L])
    best_ntree <- .ci_forest_ntree_from_row(refit_params, ntree)
    best_surrogate_control <- .ci_surrogate_control(best_control, surrogate_control)

    if (isTRUE(refit)) {
      if (!is.null(seed_base)) {
        set.seed(seed_base + nrow(tuning_grid) * length(resample_index) + 1L)
      }
      best_fit <- ci_forest(
        formula = formula,
        data = data,
        rank_name = rank_name,
        outcome_name = outcome_name,
        weights = weights,
        type = best_type,
        control = best_control,
        ntree = best_ntree,
        perturb = perturb,
        parallel = identical(parallel_over, "forest"),
        future.seed = future.seed,
        na.action = na.action,
        ...
      )
      surrogate <- .ci_fit_forest_surrogate(
        forest = best_fit,
        data = data,
        formula = formula,
        rank_name = rank_name,
        prediction_name = prediction_name,
        weights = weights,
        type = best_type,
        control = best_surrogate_control,
        na.action = na.action
      )
      best_surrogate <- surrogate$fit
      best_surrogate_data <- surrogate$data
    }
  }

  out <- list(
    fold_results = fold_results,
    summary = summary,
    best_params = best_params,
    best_type = best_type,
    best_control = best_control,
    best_fit = best_fit,
    best_surrogate = best_surrogate,
    best_surrogate_data = best_surrogate_data,
    metric = metrics,
    metric_direction = .ci_metric_directions(metrics),
    selection_metric = selection_metric,
    model = "forest",
    fold_id = fold_id_out,
    resamples = resample_index,
    control_grid = data.table::as.data.table(tuning_grid),
    predictions = predictions,
    extracts = extracts,
    fits = fits,
    notes = notes,
    validation_roots = root_table,
    prediction_name = prediction_name,
    control = control
  )
  class(out) <- c("ci_forest_tuning", "ci_tree_tuning", class(out))
  out
}
```

```{r, function-tune_cf_ci}
#' Tune greedy concentration-index forest controls by cross-validation
#'
#' `tune_cf_ci()` is kept for existing code. New code should use
#' [tune_ci_forest()].
#'
#' @return A `ci_forest_tuning` object.
#' @name tune_ci_forest
#' @rdname tune_ci_forest
#' @export
tune_cf_ci <- function(...) {
  tune_ci_forest(...)
}
```

```{r, tests-tune_ci_tree}
# WARNING - Generated by {fusen} from dev/model_selection.Rmd: do not edit by hand # nolint: line_length_linter.

test_that("tune_ci_tree selects greedy tree controls and CI type", {
  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = c(10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80),
    outcome = c(1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1),
    income = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16),
    group = factor(c("a", "a", "b", "b", "a", "a", "b", "b"))
  )
  tree_grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 1,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1
  )
  forest_grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 1,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1:2
  )

  tuned <- tune_ci_tree(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income + group,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = c("CI", "CIg"),
    control_grid = tree_grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 1,
    refit = TRUE
  )

  expect_s3_class(tuned, "ci_tree_tuning")
  expect_s3_class(tuned$fold_results, "data.table")
  expect_s3_class(tuned$summary, "data.table")
  expect_equal(nrow(tuned$fold_results), nrow(tree_grid) * 2L * 2L)
  expect_s3_class(tuned$best_fit, "ci_tree")
  expect_true(tuned$best_type %in% c("CI", "CIg"))
  expect_true("type" %in% names(tuned$best_params))
  expect_equal(sort(tuned$best_params$type), c("CI", "CIg"))
  expect_equal(sort(ci_select_best(tuned)$type), c("CI", "CIg"))
  expect_equal(nrow(ci_show_best(tuned, n = 1L)), 2L)
  expect_false("mincriterion" %in% names(tuned$best_params))
})

test_that("tune_ci_tree can minimize Brier score", {
  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = seq(10, 160, 10),
    outcome = rep(c(1, 0, 1, 0), 4),
    income = seq(2, 32, 2),
    group = factor(rep(c("a", "b"), 8))
  )
  grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 2,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1
  )

  tuned <- tune_ci_tree(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income + group,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = "CI",
    control_grid = grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 2,
    metric = "brier",
    refit = FALSE
  )

  expect_equal(tuned$metric_direction, "minimize")
  expect_null(tuned$best_fit)
  expect_true(is.finite(tuned$summary$mean_score[1]))
})

test_that("tune_ci_tree supports multiple metrics, controls, and collectors", {
  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = c(10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80),
    outcome = c(1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1),
    income = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16),
    group = factor(c("a", "a", "b", "b", "a", "a", "b", "b"))
  )
  grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 1,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1
  )

  tuned <- tune_ci_tree(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income + group,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = "CI",
    control_grid = grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 6,
    metrics = c("validation_gain", "brier"),
    control = control_ci_tune(
      save_pred = TRUE,
      save_fit = TRUE,
      extract = function(x) length(partykit::nodeids(x, terminal = TRUE))
    ),
    refit = FALSE
  )

  expect_equal(tuned$selection_metric, "validation_gain")
  expect_true(all(c("validation_gain", "brier") %in% tuned$summary$metric))
  expect_s3_class(ci_collect_metrics(tuned), "data.table")
  expect_s3_class(ci_collect_metrics(tuned, summarize = FALSE), "data.table")
  expect_equal(nrow(ci_show_best(tuned, n = 1L)), 1L)
  expect_equal(nrow(ci_select_best(tuned)), 1L)
  expect_gt(nrow(ci_collect_predictions(tuned)), 0L)
  expect_gt(nrow(ci_collect_fits(tuned)), 0L)
  expect_gt(nrow(ci_collect_extracts(tuned)), 0L)
  expect_s3_class(ci_collect_notes(tuned), "data.table")
})

test_that("tune_ci_tree supports percent validation root recovered", {
  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = c(10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80),
    outcome = c(1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1),
    income = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16)
  )
  grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 1,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1
  )

  tuned <- tune_ci_tree(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = "CI",
    control_grid = grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 8,
    metrics = c("percent_validation_root_recovered"),
    refit = FALSE
  )

  expect_equal(tuned$selection_metric, "percent_validation_root_recovered")
  expect_equal(tuned$metric_direction, "maximize")
  expect_true(all(tuned$summary$metric == "percent_validation_root_recovered"))
  expect_true(all(is.finite(tuned$summary$mean_score)))
})

test_that("tune_ci_tree accepts rsample resamples when available", {
  skip_if_not_installed("rsample")

  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = c(10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80),
    outcome = c(1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1),
    income = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16)
  )
  grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 1,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1
  )
  folds <- rsample::vfold_cv(toy_data, v = 2)

  tuned <- tune_ci_tree(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    control_grid = grid,
    resamples = folds,
    type = "CI",
    refit = FALSE
  )

  expect_true(all(grepl("Fold", tuned$fold_results$fold_id)))
  expect_equal(length(unique(tuned$fold_results$fold_id)), 2L)
})

test_that("tune_ci_forest tunes greedy forests and returns a surrogate", {
  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = c(10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80),
    outcome = c(1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1),
    income = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16),
    group = factor(c("a", "a", "b", "b", "a", "a", "b", "b"))
  )
  grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 1,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1:2,
    mtry = 1:2,
    ntree = c(3L, 5L)
  )

  tuned <- tune_ci_forest(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income + group,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = c("CI", "CIg"),
    control_grid = grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 3,
    refit = TRUE
  )

  expect_s3_class(tuned, "ci_forest_tuning")
  expect_equal(tuned$model, "forest")
  expect_s3_class(tuned$best_fit, "ci_forest")
  expect_s3_class(tuned$best_surrogate, "ci_tree")
  expect_equal(nrow(tuned$fold_results), nrow(grid) * 2L * 2L)
  expect_true("ntree" %in% names(tuned$best_params))
  expect_true("type" %in% names(tuned$best_params))
  expect_equal(sort(tuned$best_params$type), c("CI", "CIg"))
  expect_equal(sort(ci_select_best(tuned)$type), c("CI", "CIg"))
  expect_true("forest_risk" %in% names(tuned$best_surrogate_data))
  expect_true(tuned$best_type %in% c("CI", "CIg"))
  expect_true(is.finite(tuned$summary$mean_score[1]))
})

test_that("tune_ci_forest supports multiple metrics and saved predictions", {
  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = seq(10, 160, 10),
    outcome = rep(c(1, 0, 1, 0), 4),
    income = seq(2, 32, 2),
    group = factor(rep(c("a", "b"), 8))
  )
  grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 2,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1,
    mtry = 1,
    ntree = 3L
  )

  tuned <- tune_ci_forest(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income + group,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = "CI",
    control_grid = grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 7,
    metrics = c("validation_gain", "brier"),
    control = control_ci_tune(save_pred = TRUE),
    refit = FALSE
  )

  expect_s3_class(tuned, "ci_forest_tuning")
  expect_true(all(c("validation_gain", "brier") %in% tuned$summary$metric))
  expect_gt(nrow(ci_collect_predictions(tuned)), 0L)
})

test_that("legacy tuning names remain compatibility aliases", {
  toy_data <- data.frame(
    rank = c(10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80),
    outcome = c(1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1),
    income = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16)
  )
  grid <- ci_tree_control_grid(
    minsplit = 1,
    minbucket = 1,
    minprob = 0,
    maxdepth = 1,
    ntree = 3L
  )

  tree_tuned <- tune_ctree_ci(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = "CI",
    control_grid = grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 4,
    refit = FALSE
  )
  forest_tuned <- tune_cf_ci(
    cbind(rank, outcome) ~ income,
    data = toy_data,
    rank_name = "rank",
    outcome_name = "outcome",
    type = "CI",
    control_grid = grid,
    v = 2,
    seed = 5,
    refit = FALSE
  )

  expect_s3_class(tree_tuned, "ci_tree_tuning")
  expect_s3_class(forest_tuned, "ci_forest_tuning")
})
```

```{r development-inflate, eval=FALSE}
# Run but keep eval=FALSE to avoid infinite loop
# Execute in the console directly
fusen::inflate(
  flat_file = "dev/model_selection.Rmd",
  vignette_name = "Model selection"
)
```
